title: Building an app with shinypal
text: host calls shinypal_ui() UI shinypal_setup() top server function. take vector paths module directories. shinypal_ui() renders two cards (menu possible steps left draggable workflow right) plus sidebar holding live report download button. shinypal_setup() initializes shared reactive state, wires report download handler, sources module’s ui-aux.R server.R.
code: modules <- list.dirs("modules", recursive = FALSE)  ui <- bslib::page_navbar(   title = "My workflow builder",   bslib::nav_panel("Build", shinypal_ui(modules)) )  server <- function(input, output, session) {   shinypal_setup(     input, output, session,     modules = modules,     download_template = "modules/report.qmd"   ) }  shiny::shinyApp(ui, server)

title: Building an app with shinypal
text: module folder containing least three files: ui-aux.R server.R sourced local = TRUE, share host’s input/output/session can see ’s definitions.

title: Building an app with shinypal
text: file evaluated value becomes panel menu, return single [bslib::accordion_panel()]. Give action button server listen .
code: bslib::accordion_panel(   "Filter rows",   "Keep only the rows that match a condition.",   shiny::actionButton("add_filter", "Add this step") )

title: Building an app with shinypal
text: Defines two functions step index ind: one draws step’s panel workflow accordion, one draws block report. Use shinypal UI helpers panel gets remove button, dataset selector, copy-able code block free.
code: filter_workflow <- function(ind) {   accordion_panel_remove_button(     ind, "Filter rows",     select_dataset_input(ind),     select_column_input(ind, "Column to filter on:"),     shiny::numericInput(paste0("min_", ind), "Minimum value", value = 0),     df_modal_button(ind)   ) }  filter_report <- function(ind) {   verbatimTextOutput_copy(ind) }

title: Building an app with shinypal
text: Add button clicked, grab fresh index next_step_index(), build [shinymeta::metaReactive2()] computes result records code produced , register everything add_shinypal_data_step(). add_shinypal_data_step() stores result step_varname(ind) (prefix set shinypal_setup() plus step index; e.g., data_1), renders generated code report, wires “view data” modal, (select_dataset = TRUE) keeps dataset dropdown sync steps come go. later step can consume step’s output calling get_int_data().
code: shiny::observeEvent(input$add_filter, {   ind <- next_step_index()    # metaReactive2 returns the data when called, and its code when expanded.   # Use step_varname(ind) for the variable name so it matches the id shinypal   # stores this step's dataset under.   data <- shinymeta::metaReactive2(varname = step_varname(ind), {     df  <- get_int_data(input[[paste0("dataset_", ind)]])()     col <- input[[paste0("column_", ind)]]     shiny::req(col)     shinymeta::metaExpr(       dplyr::filter(df, !!col >= !!input[[paste0("min_", ind)]])     )   })    add_shinypal_data_step(     ind,     data         = data,     fun_workflow = filter_workflow,     fun_report   = filter_report,     libs         = "dplyr",     select_dataset = TRUE,     column_ids   = paste0("column_", ind)   ) })

title: Building an app with shinypal
text: step produces figure instead dataset uses add_shinypal_plot_step() [shinymeta::metaRender2()] render. Point output_prefix plotOutput() id used report.
code: plot_render <- shinymeta::metaRender2(shiny::renderPlot, {   df <- get_int_data(input[[paste0("dataset_", ind)]])()   shinymeta::metaExpr(plot(df)) })  add_shinypal_plot_step(   ind,   plot          = plot_render,   fun_workflow  = plot_workflow,   fun_report    = function(ind) shiny::plotOutput(paste0("plot_", ind)),   output_prefix = "plot_" )

title: Building an app with shinypal
text: shinypal_setup(download_template = ...) points Quarto/R Markdown template two knitr-expandable variables, {{libraries}} {{code}}, shinypal fills assembled library() calls step code. Files user uploads [shiny::fileInput()] can bundled download registering file_observe().

what: Deploying to the browser with shinylive
title: Building an app with shinypal
text: shinypal apps can exported shinylive run entirely browser via webR. things behave differently (e.g., system zip, packages without WebAssembly build can’t load), use is_shinylive() gate behavior:
code: # only attempt to load a package that has no WebAssembly build outside webR if (!is_shinylive() && requireNamespace("paleobioDB", quietly = TRUE)) {   library(paleobioDB) }

title: Authors and Citation
text: William Gearty. Author, maintainer.

title: Authors and Citation
text: Gearty W (2026). shinypal: Tools Make Modular Interactive R Workflow Builders. R package version 0.0.0.9000, https://github.com/willgearty/shinypal.
code: @Manual{,   title = {shinypal: Tools to Make Modular and Interactive R Workflow Builders},   author = {William Gearty},   year = {2026},   note = {R package version 0.0.0.9000},   url = {https://github.com/willgearty/shinypal}, }

what: Tools to Make Modular and Interactive R Workflow Builders
title: Tools to Make Modular and Interactive R Workflow Builders
text: shinypal provides building blocks modular, interactive Shiny applications turn point--click pipelines reproducible R R Markdown code. Using shinymeta, shinypal assembles code modules draggable workflow, shows equivalent code user builds , lets export whole pipeline runnable script rendered report.

title: Tools to Make Modular and Interactive R Workflow Builders
text: shinypal yet CRAN. Install development version GitHub:

title: Tools to Make Modular and Interactive R Workflow Builders
text: shinypal app two halves: small host app calls shinypal_ui() UI shinypal_setup() top server function, pointing directory modules. One module per group analysis steps. module folder least three files: ui-main.R (panel advertising steps), ui-aux.R (interactive workflow components related steps), server.R (builds steps’ shinymeta reactives registers via shinypal). steps added, shinypal keeps reactive code chain workflow order, renders step’s generated code, assembles downloadable script report. See vignette("shinypal") walkthrough building app.

title: Tools to Make Modular and Interactive R Workflow Builders
text: Development shinypal supported : Norman Newell Early Career Grant Paleontological Society. Grants (#G2023-20946, #G-2025-79206) Alfred P. Sloan Foundation Syracuse University Open Source Program Office (SU-OSPO).

title: Tools to Make Modular and Interactive R Workflow Builders
text: GPL (>= 3) © William Gearty

what: Accordion panel that includes a remove button — accordion_panel_remove_button
title: Accordion panel that includes a remove button — accordion_panel_remove_button
text: bslib::accordion_panel() pre-wired "Remove step" button data-rank-id attribute shinypal's sortable workflow needs. Use panel returned step's fun_workflow.

title: Accordion panel that includes a remove button — accordion_panel_remove_button
Accordion panel that includes a remove button — accordion_panel_remove_button
text: ind index step. ... Additional arguments passed bslib::accordion_panel().

title: Accordion panel that includes a remove button — accordion_panel_remove_button
text: bslib::accordion_panel() tag value = "step_<ind>" matching data-rank-id attribute.

title: Accordion panel that includes a remove button — accordion_panel_remove_button
code:
accordion_panel_remove_button(1, "My step") #>
#>
#> #>
#>
#>
#> #>
#>
#>

what: Register a complete data-producing step — add_shinypal_data_step
title: Register a complete data-producing step — add_shinypal_data_step
text: Convenience wrapper around boilerplate shared every step produces intermediate dataset: stores data reactive, wires data-preview modal, registers step via add_shinypal_step(), (optionally) keeps dataset dropdown column selectors sync. module supplies data reactive UI/report functions.

title: Register a complete data-producing step — add_shinypal_data_step
code: add_shinypal_data_step(   ind,   data,   fun_workflow,   fun_report,   libs = character(0),   code_guard = NULL,   ec_subs = NULL,   select_dataset = FALSE,   column_ids = character(0),   rename = TRUE )

title: Register a complete data-producing step — add_shinypal_data_step
text: ind index step. data shinymeta::metaReactive2() object produced step. use varname = step_varname(ind) generated variable name matches stored name. fun_workflow function generates UI elements workflow. fun_report function generates UI elements report. libs character vector R packages required step. code_guard optional zero-argument function evaluated inside code output get_chunk(). Use surface step-specific validate() messages; plain req()s inside data already propagate get_chunk(), simple steps can leave NULL. ec_subs optional list length 2, first element metaReactive object second element callback function. used substitute expansion contexts code chain. select_dataset Whether step consumes upstream dataset (thus needs df_select_observe() keep dataset dropdown current). column_ids character vector column-selector input ids keep sync via column_select_observe() (one per select_column_input()). rename Whether render varname_input() text field step's panel (install var_name_observe()) user can give step's dataset custom name, used label later selectors variable name generated script. Defaults TRUE.

title: Register a complete data-producing step — add_shinypal_data_step
text: Called side effects returns NULL invisibly. Stores step's data reactive step_varname() id (e.g. data_1), wires code output data-preview modal, registers step via add_shinypal_step(), (requested) installs dataset/column selector observers , rename = TRUE, dataset-rename field observer.

title: Register a complete data-producing step — add_shinypal_data_step
code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ # inside a module's server.R ind <- next_step_index() occs <- shinymeta::metaReactive2(varname = step_varname(ind), {   shinymeta::metaExpr(head(mtcars, input[[paste0("n_", ind)]])) }) add_shinypal_data_step(   ind, data = occs,   fun_workflow = function(ind) accordion_panel_remove_button(ind, "Subset"),   fun_report = function(ind) verbatimTextOutput_copy(ind) ) } # }

what: Register a complete plot-producing step — add_shinypal_plot_step
title: Register a complete plot-producing step — add_shinypal_plot_step
text: Convenience wrapper around boilerplate shared every step renders plot: assigns rendered plot output slot, renders step's generated code, registers step via add_shinypal_step(), (optionally) keeps dataset dropdown column selectors sync. module supplies plot render UI/report functions. Unlike add_shinypal_data_step(), plot step store intermediate dataset show data-preview modal; result figure, selectable data.frame.

title: Register a complete plot-producing step — add_shinypal_plot_step
code: add_shinypal_plot_step(   ind,   plot,   fun_workflow,   fun_report,   libs = character(0),   code_guard = NULL,   output_prefix = "plot_",   select_dataset = TRUE,   column_ids = character(0) )

title: Register a complete plot-producing step — add_shinypal_plot_step
text: ind index step. plot shinymeta::metaRender2() object renders plot. fun_workflow function generates UI elements workflow. fun_report function generates UI elements report. libs character vector R packages required step. code_guard optional zero-argument function evaluated inside code output get_chunk(). Use surface step-specific validate() messages. output_prefix prefix plot's output slot, combined ind form id (default "plot_", giving plot_<ind>). Must match shiny::plotOutput() id used fun_report (e.g. "map_"). select_dataset Whether step consumes upstream dataset (thus needs df_select_observe() keep dataset dropdown current). column_ids character vector column-selector input ids keep sync via column_select_observe() (one per select_column_input()).

title: Register a complete plot-producing step — add_shinypal_plot_step
text: Called side effects returns NULL invisibly. Assigns rendered plot output[[<output_prefix><ind>]], renders step's generated code, registers step via add_shinypal_step(), (requested) installs dataset/column selector observers.

title: Register a complete plot-producing step — add_shinypal_plot_step
code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ # inside a module's server.R ind <- next_step_index() p <- shinymeta::metaRender2(shiny::renderPlot, {   df <- get_int_data(input[[paste0("dataset_", ind)]])()   shinymeta::metaExpr(plot(df)) }) add_shinypal_plot_step(   ind, plot = p,   fun_workflow = function(ind) accordion_panel_remove_button(ind, "Plot"),   fun_report = function(ind) shiny::plotOutput(paste0("plot_", ind)) ) } # }

what: Add a step to the report, workflow, and the code chain — add_shinypal_step
title: Add a step to the report, workflow, and the code chain — add_shinypal_step
text: Registers single step shinypal's reactive state. inserts step's panel workflow accordion, appends step's block report, adds step's quoted code code chain used assemble reproducible script, records packages step needs. ec_subs supplied, also registers expansion-context substitution downloadable script can swap alternate code (example, fully-qualified calls). data-producing steps instead use add_shinypal_data_step(), wraps together data storage, code output, selector boilerplate. Call add_shinypal_step() directly steps fit pattern.

title: Add a step to the report, workflow, and the code chain — add_shinypal_step
code: add_shinypal_step(   ind,   fun_workflow,   fun_report,   code_chain_list,   libs = character(0),   ec_subs = NULL )

title: Add a step to the report, workflow, and the code chain — add_shinypal_step
text: ind index step. fun_workflow function generates UI elements workflow. fun_report function generates UI elements report. code_chain_list list quoted code bits added code_chain(). libs character vector R packages required step. ec_subs optional list length 2, first element metaReactive object second element callback function. used substitute expansion contexts code chain.

title: Add a step to the report, workflow, and the code chain — add_shinypal_step
text: Called side effects returns NULL invisibly. step registered shinypal's reactive state (panel inserted workflow accordion, block appended report, quoted code added code chain, packages recorded), remove-button observer installed .

title: Add a step to the report, workflow, and the code chain — add_shinypal_step
code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ # inside a module's server.R, which shinypal_setup() sources with local = TRUE ind <- next_step_index() add_shinypal_step(   ind,   fun_workflow = function(ind) accordion_panel_remove_button(ind, "Head"),   fun_report = function(ind) verbatimTextOutput_copy(ind),   code_chain_list = list(quote(head(mtcars))),   libs = "utils" ) } # }

what: shinypal: Tools to Make Modular and Interactive R Workflow Builders — shinypal-package
title: shinypal: Tools to Make Modular and Interactive R Workflow Builders — shinypal-package
text: Provides building blocks modular, interactive shiny applications turn point--click pipelines reproducible R R Markdown code. Using shinymeta, shinypal assembles code modules draggable workflow, shows equivalent code user builds , lets export whole pipeline runnable script rendered report.

title: shinypal: Tools to Make Modular and Interactive R Workflow Builders — shinypal-package
text: Maintainer: William Gearty willgearty@gmail.com (ORCID) Authors: William Gearty willgearty@gmail.com (ORCID)

title: Setup shinypal — shinypal_setup
text: function set shinypal environment. function called top server function shiny app.

title: Setup shinypal — shinypal_setup
code: shinypal_setup(   input,   output,   session,   modules,   download_filename = "shinypal_script.zip",   download_template = "./modules/test_report.qmd",   prefix = "data_" )

title: Setup shinypal — shinypal_setup
text: input shiny input object. output shiny output object. session shiny session object. modules character vector paths independent modules. download_filename name file download user clicks download button. download_template path Quarto markdown template file used generate report. prefix Prefix data step's internal id variable name gets generated script (default "data_"). Use step_varname() retrieve full value given step index.

title: Setup shinypal — shinypal_setup
text: Called side effects returns NULL invisibly. initializes shinypal's shared reactive state, renders live report wires download handler workflow observers, sources module's ui-aux.R server.R steps become available.

title: Setup shinypal — shinypal_setup
text: module ui-aux.R file defines UI elements module "Workflow" accordion server.R file defines server-side logic module.

title: Setup shinypal — shinypal_setup
